text: there were no benefits. i had severe side effects. . the medication helped the headaches for a short amount of time but the side effects outweighed the benefits. i call it the stupid medicine because i literally turned stupid after using it. forgetfulness, shakes, loss of balance, loss of muscle mass i was to take one pill daily for the maintence of migraine headaches. i never could progress to the higher does to see if it helped b/c the side effects on the low dose was terrible
